apped_paired_reads	qualimap_duplex_bamqc-total_reads	qualimap_duplex_bamqc-ns	qualimap_duplex_bamqc-duplication_rate	fastqc-percent_duplicates	fastqc-percent_gc	fastqc-avg_sequence_length	fastqc-median_sequence_length	fastqc-percent_fails	fastqc-total_sequences
